info.title: DotnetCtrfJsonReporter
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 Matthew Thomas
-p, --trx-path            Required. Path to the TRX file.
-f, --output-filename     (Default: ctrf-report.json) Name of the CTRF report.
-d, --output-directory    (Default: ctrf) Output directory for the report.
-t, --test-tool           (Default: dotnet) Name of the test tool (nunit,
mstest, xunit, etc.).
--help                    Display this help screen.
--version                 Display version information.

options.name: --trx-path
options.description: Required. Path to the TRX file.

options.name: --output-filename
options.description: (Default: ctrf-report.json) Name of the CTRF report.

options.name: --output-directory
options.description: (Default: ctrf) Output directory for the report.

options.name: --test-tool
options.description:
(Default: dotnet) Name of the test tool (nunit,
mstest, xunit, etc.).
